print.description: prints inline value arg1 to console, can have more than 1 parameter: prints them seperated by " " .

println.description: prints newline value arg1 to console, can have more than 1 parameter: prints them seperated by " " .

jump.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_eq.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_neq.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_ge.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_g.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_le.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

jump_l.description: if condition true, jumps to line number given as param3 (-breaks jumps to next 'end' statement)

ret.description: jump back to last call line stored

malloc.description: allocates cells from the heap and stores reference address in arg1

add.description: adds arg2 and arg3 and stores result in arg1

sub.description: subs arg2 and arg3 and stores result in arg1

mul.description: muls arg2 and arg3 and stores result in arg1

div.description: div arg2 and arg3 and stores result in arg1

mod.description: mods arg2 and arg3 and stores result in arg1

move.description: changes value of arg1 to arg2

pop.description: pops last value from the stack

push.description: pushes arg1 on top of the stack, can have multiple parameters: pushes them in order

loopi.description: a loop that iterates val times over R1
